title: Vaccination status review

investigations.text: Defines consent context, scheduled-dose and history checks, illness, previous severe reaction, immune status, medication and recent-vaccine screening.
investigations.rationale: Relevant to documenting consent and pre-administration history only when an actual vaccine encounter exists.
investigations.evidence_extract: Defines consent context, scheduled-dose and history checks, illness, previous severe reaction, immune status, medication and recent-vaccine screening.

source.title: Guidelines for Best Practice in Immunization

exact_section.heading: 15. Recommendation Eleven: Vaccine Administration and Recording — consent, preparation, screening, and interview questions

assessment.text: Defines DHA immunization scope and the national childhood programme and schedule context.
assessment.rationale: Defines the child-program boundary and cannot support a universal status.
assessment.evidence_extract: Defines DHA immunization scope and the national childhood programme and schedule context.

source.title: Guidelines for Best Practice in Immunization

exact_section.heading: 2. Scope; 3. Purpose; 4. Applicability; 5. Childhood Immunization Program 0 to 6 Years

medication.text: Requires review of the child vaccination history, use of age-appropriate catch-up scheduling, and completion without restarting a series solely because of elapsed time.
medication.rationale: Relevant to recorded child dose history when the programme and age are established.
medication.evidence_extract: Requires review of the child vaccination history, use of age-appropriate catch-up scheduling, and completion without restarting a series solely because of elapsed time.

source.title: Guidelines for Best Practice in Immunization

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Age, vaccine, record provenance, doses, dates, programme, pregnancy, immune status and indication are absent.
No vaccination status, due date, schedule, eligibility, dose or administration is generated.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
